name: tiktok
description: Built-in platform provider for TikTok videos and profiles.

search.description: Search for TikTok videos via the search_web SERP chain. Results depend on external search indexing, not TikTok's own search.

fetch.description: Fetch a TikTok video. Returns author, description, engagement counts (likes, comments, shares, views), video URL, hashtags, and top comments sorted by likes (up to maxComments, with replies up to maxRepliesPerComment). Comments require a browser session.

Fetch a TikTok profile. Returns name, handle, bio, follower/following/like/video counts, avatar, verification status, and up to 12 latest video URLs. Requires a browser session. Pass a profile URL like tiktok.com/@username.
